summary: AdminPage refactoring verification complete. All 9 admin tabs render correctly after splitting from 1588-line file into 10 smaller components. Tab navigation, URL routing, and tab content all working as expected.

console_warnings.issue: Recharts width/height warnings during initial load - 'width(-1) and height(-1) of chart should be greater than 0'. Non-blocking, charts render correctly after container sizing settles.
React hydration warning - '<span> cannot be a child of <option>'. This appears to be related to Emergent editor instrumentation spans, not actual code issue. Non-blocking.

passed_tests: Stats cards show: Total Users (20), Estates (13), Documents (10), Pending (0)
All 9 tab buttons exist with correct data-testid attributes
Users tab (default): renders user list, search input, role filter buttons
TVT (Transition) tab: navigates to /admin/transition, shows Transition Verification Team content
DTS tab: navigates to /admin/dts, shows DTS Team Portal content
Support tab: navigates to /admin/support, shows Conversations list with chat interface
Subscriptions tab: navigates to /admin/subscriptions, shows Beta Mode toggle, Family Plan toggle, Plan Pricing
Verifications tab: navigates to /admin/verifications, shows Tier Verification Requests with Approve/Deny buttons
Analytics tab: navigates to /admin/analytics, shows KPI cards (MRR, Trial Conversion, Churn Rate), charts render
Activity tab: navigates to /admin/activity, shows Recent platform activity log with Refresh button
Dev Switcher tab: navigates to /admin/dev-switcher, shows configuration form with Save button
Users tab search: filters users correctly (searched 'test' → 19 users shown)
Users tab role filters: All, Benefactor, Beneficiary, Admin buttons work
URL-based direct navigation works for all tabs
critical_code_review_comments: Refactoring successful - AdminPage.js reduced from 1588 lines to 142 lines
All 9 tab components correctly imported and conditionally rendered
URL routing working correctly with PATH_TO_TAB mapping
data-testid attributes properly added to all tab buttons and content containers
Props passed correctly to child components (users, setUsers, getAuthHeaders, etc.)
context_for_next_testing_agent: AdminPage refactoring verified complete. 1588-line monolithic AdminPage.js successfully split into 10 files: AdminPage.js (142 lines - shell) + 9 tab components (UsersTab, TransitionTab, DTSTab, SupportTab, SubscriptionsTab, VerificationsTab, AnalyticsTab, ActivityTab, DevSwitcherTab). All tabs render correctly with proper URL routing. Minor console warnings from Recharts and React hydration don't affect functionality.
